verses.text: Tua zawh tawlkhat khit ciangin, Egypt kumpipa' an piapa leh a an huanpa in Egypt kumpipa ahi amau' topa hehsak uh hi
An piapipa leh an huanpipa ahi, ama nuai-a mangte nih tungah Faro heh a
Josef a kikhumna thong sung, inncing mangpa' inn sungah amah in amaute a koih hi
Inncing mangpa in amaute Josef kemsak a, amah in amaute' na sem hi. Kikhumna sungah amaute tawlkhat om uh hi
Zan khat amaute gel in mang man uh hi. Thong sunga a om an piapa leh an huanpa, amau' mang a tuam tuak, a mang khiatna zong a tuam tuak mah ahi hi
Zingsang ciangin amaute kiangah Josef pai-in amaute a muh ciangin, amaute na lungkham uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin a topa' inn sunga amah tawh a kikhumin a om Faro' nuai-a mangte amah in dong a, “Bang hangin tuni-in maimial na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi

Amaute in ama kiangah, “Mang ka man uh a, tuate a khiathei ding omlo hi,” na ci uh hi. Josef in amaute kiangah, “Mang khiat theihnate Pasian' hong piak hilo ahi hiam? Kei kiangah hong gen un, hong thum ing,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin an piapipa in Josef kiangah a mang gen a, “Ka mangin ka mai-ah leenggui khat om a
tua leenggui tungah hiang thum om hi. A sel phetin pakkhia pah a, a bomte leenggah suakin min pah hi
Ka khutsungah Faro' hai ka tawi hi. Keimah in leenggahte lo-in Faro' hai sungah ka suk a, Faro' khut tungah a hai ka pia hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Josef in ama kiangah, “A khiatna hih bang ahi hi. Hiang thumte, ni thum ahi hi
Ni thum sungin Faro in nang hong khah ding a, na za-ah nang hong koih kik ding hi. Ama an piapa na hih lai-a mah bangin ama khut tungah Faro' hai na pia ding hi
Ahih hangin kei hong phawk in. Nang tungah thu hong hoih ciangin kei tungah hehpihna hong bawl in, kong thum hi. Faro' tungah kei' thu genin, hih inn panin kei hong lakhia in
Bang hang hiam cih leh Hebru mite' gam panin kei hong kigukhia a, hih lai-ah zong amaute in thong mial sungah kei hong koihna dingin bangmah ka gamta kei hi,” a ci hi
An huanpipa in a khiatna a hoihlam hi, ci-in a muh ciangin, amah in Josef kiangah, “Kei zong mang khat ka man hi: Ka lu tungah mohlawh thum om a
a lawh tungnung pen sungah an huansa namkim Faro-a' dingin om hi. Ahih hangin ka lu tunga lawh sung panin vasate in ne uh hi,” a ci hi
Josef in dawngin, “A khiatna hih bang ahi hi: Lawh thumte, ni thum ahi hi
Ni thum sungin Faro in nang hong lakhia-in na lu hong tan ding a, sing tung khatah nang hong khai ding hi. Vasate in na sa ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi
A ni thum ni, Faro' suah ni hunin, amah in a nasemte khempeuh-a' dingin pawi khat kham a, an piapipa leh an huanpipa lakhia hi
Amah in an piapipa an piak nasepah koihkik a, amah in Faro' khutsungah a hai pia hi
Ahih hangin Josef' khiat mah bangin an huanpipa a khailum hi
Ahi zongin an piapipa in Josef phawk nawnlo a, amah mangngilh ta hi.
